# OpenZaps

> OpenZaps turn approved DeFi workflows into sealed, immutable policy capsules that a Hermes agent can simulate, submit, monitor, and revoke — without ever holding discretionary wallet authority. 0xZAPS, the ERC-20 paired with aeWETH in OpenZaps' first bounded live route, is live on Robinhood Chain through a creator-verified Clanker V4 market (contract 0xDd90bFa4adC7F4401E611AbaC692D939F9F4CB07).

Key facts:
- Production v1.1 contracts are live on Robinhood Chain (chain ID 4663; factory 0xFC775017b25d2458623E2f3E735A4B750dD8b4E4). Bounded aeWETH ↔ 0xZAPS creation is open; contracts are internally reviewed (63 Foundry tests, 9 internal findings fixed) but pre-external-audit, and deposits carry funds-at-risk warnings. An earlier Base mainnet factory (0xc7C5897e4738a157731c2F93b1d73Db9926E926C) is historical only and not used by the production app.
- The token confers no yield, equity, revenue claim, governance, staking, or protocol access guarantee.
- Execution authority is bound in EIP-712-signed policies: fixed adapters, spend ceilings, recipients, deadlines, postconditions, and unconditional owner revoke paths.

## Pages

- [Home](https://www.0xzaps.com): what OpenZaps are, authority models, security posture, FAQ
- [Live zap console](https://www.0xzaps.com/app): connect a wallet to quote, create, fund, execute, and recover a bounded aeWETH ↔ 0xZAPS policy capsule
- [Dashboard](https://www.0xzaps.com/dashboard): live zap creations, executions, and recoveries read from Robinhood Chain logs, plus the verified contract set
- [Developer docs](https://www.0xzaps.com/docs): policy schema, simulation API, templates, lifecycle
- [Security architecture](https://www.0xzaps.com/security): threat model, controls, production gates
- [Pricing](https://www.0xzaps.com/pricing): simulation is free; protocol fees are governance-gated
- [Roadmap](https://www.0xzaps.com/roadmap): live bounded route → more templates → relayers → audits
- [0xZAPS token](https://www.0xzaps.com/token): verified contract, official Clanker market, FAQ
- [Risk disclosures](https://www.0xzaps.com/legal): pre-audit software, onchain irreversibility, token risk

## Official links

- X (Twitter): https://x.com/0xzaps
- GitHub: https://github.com/nodar/openzaps
- Token market (Clanker): https://www.clanker.world/clanker/0xDd90bFa4adC7F4401E611AbaC692D939F9F4CB07
- Explorer: https://robinhoodchain.blockscout.com/token/0xDd90bFa4adC7F4401E611AbaC692D939F9F4CB07

## API

- POST https://www.0xzaps.com/api/policies/simulate — deterministic policy simulation; never broadcasts and never requests wallet authority
- GET https://www.0xzaps.com/api/health — public protocol status
- GET https://www.0xzaps.com/api/protocol/activity — live zap creations, executions, and recoveries aggregated from Robinhood Chain logs (rows verified against the factory's ZapCreated set)

Not financial advice. Always verify the token contract address on this site before trading.
